authority_invariant: No CREBAIN 0.9.0 profile authorizes or applies output to an external plant.

profiles.name: Analysis
profiles.claim: Offline/source-level analysis and evidence inspection only; this name is not a runtime selector.

profiles.name: SimulationNoAuthority
profiles.claim: Local browser research simulation may mutate simulated state but has no external plant capability.

profiles.name: ReadOnlyTelemetry
profiles.claim: Packaged native telemetry exposes bounded subscription surfaces only; no generic publish or service capability is registered.

profiles.name: Observed
profiles.claim: The dormant feature-gated Galadriel producer can emit advisory evidence only after exact runtime gates; no deployed receiver or security qualification is claimed.

profiles.name: EngramFederated
profiles.claim: Removed from 0.9.0 claims until exact final NCP/Engram artifacts and mixed-version/security evidence exist.

profiles.name: ExternalAuthority
profiles.claim: No external authority adapter, receipt-to-apply path, or effect acknowledgement is shipped or claimed.

profiles.name: HaldirGate
profiles.claim: No Haldir receipt/command validation or isolated plant adapter is wired into CREBAIN 0.9.0.

profiles.name: Development
profiles.claim: Vite development may use the renderer rosbridge subscription adapter and local simulation; the module is excluded from production bundles.
